verses.text: The nations are summoned to hear, for the indignation of the LORD is upon all of them, devoted to slaughter. Universal judgment is announced. No people stands outside the reckoning of God.
The nations are summoned to hear, for the indignation of the LORD is upon all of them, devoted to slaughter. Universal judgment is announced. No people stands outside the reckoning of God.
The nations are summoned to hear, for the indignation of the LORD is upon all of them, devoted to slaughter. Universal judgment is announced. No people stands outside the reckoning of God.
The host of heaven dissolves, and 'the sword of the LORD' is filled with blood, a great sacrifice in Edom. Judgment falls like a slaughter. The proud enemy of God's people is given over to ruin.
The host of heaven dissolves, and 'the sword of the LORD' is filled with blood, a great sacrifice in Edom. Judgment falls like a slaughter. The proud enemy of God's people is given over to ruin.
The host of heaven dissolves, and 'the sword of the LORD' is filled with blood, a great sacrifice in Edom. Judgment falls like a slaughter. The proud enemy of God's people is given over to ruin.
The host of heaven dissolves, and 'the sword of the LORD' is filled with blood, a great sacrifice in Edom. Judgment falls like a slaughter. The proud enemy of God's people is given over to ruin.
It is 'the day of the LORD's vengeance,' Edom's streams turned to pitch, her smoke rising for ever. Her desolation is permanent. The recompense of God's foes is final and complete.
It is 'the day of the LORD's vengeance,' Edom's streams turned to pitch, her smoke rising for ever. Her desolation is permanent. The recompense of God's foes is final and complete.
It is 'the day of the LORD's vengeance,' Edom's streams turned to pitch, her smoke rising for ever. Her desolation is permanent. The recompense of God's foes is final and complete.
Thorns fill her palaces, and wild beasts and owls dwell where men once boasted. The proud land becomes a haunt of ruin. What human glory raises, divine judgment can leave to the beasts.

Thorns fill her palaces, and wild beasts and owls dwell where men once boasted. The proud land becomes a haunt of ruin. What human glory raises, divine judgment can leave to the beasts.

Seek in 'the book of the LORD'; not one of these shall fail, for His mouth has commanded and His Spirit gathered them. His word is exact. Every detail of God's judgment and promise is sure to come to pass.
